OPEN FOR FULL-STACK OPPORTUNITIES — AI SPECIALIST — SYSTEMS PROGRAMMING — TECHNICAL COMMUNICATION — CONTACT: RAMRATANPADHY59@GMAIL.COM

RISING AI SPECIALIST REVOLUTIONIZES TECH INDUSTRY

Ramratan Padhy is a Computer Science Engineering student at SRM University AP, with a strong focus on artificial intelligence, systems programming, and technical communication. He has maintained an exceptional academic record while actively engaging in advanced research and practical applications.

His portfolio of work spans from developing complex Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines to mathematical modeling of drone trajectories. He has consistently demonstrated the ability to synthesize complex engineering concepts into accessible solutions, working effectively in both research and startup environments.

ENGINEERED FOR SPEED

This interface is a zero-dependency, single-file brutalist artifact. Designed to bypass the bloat of modern web frameworks, aggressively optimized for AEO crawlers and instant edge delivery.

TECHNICAL CHRONICLES

LATEST DISPATCHES

Argus

Python, Gemma 4, IoT Sim

  • Simulated a drone swarm that collectively maps any terrain using Gemma 4 31B vision via Cerebras.
  • Engineered autonomous agent drones sharing a collective memory that aggregates into a unified semantic map displayed on a CesiumJS 3D globe.
  • Used Gemma 4 inference to classify areas on the terrain, map traffic congregation spots
  • Worked with FastAPI to serve as the backend for the simulation

AXtheR (Windows)

C, Windows API, Wintun, Cryptography

  • Developed a high-performance, zero-dependency, easy to run UDP VPN for Windows by integrating the Wintun kernel driver and Winsock2.
  • Engineered a zero-heap allocation data path with multi-threaded asynchronous I/O and dynamic Windows routing table manipulation.
  • Implemented a self-contained, RFC-compliant ChaCha20-Poly1305 cryptographic engine from scratch in C with constant-time MAC verification.

Grand Tribunal

Python, Nemotron, Gradio, VoiceCPM

  • Shipped an Ace Attorney-style turn-based AI debate game utilizing voice input for an immersive, hands-free player experience.
  • Trained and deployed two specialized Nemotron models on character personality datasets to serve as dynamic opponents and logical judges, interfaced through a custom Gradio frontend.

BitNet-1.58b Research

Python, Machine Learning, Mathematics

  • Conducting novel research and experimentation on BitNet-1.58b by altering its context length.
